basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially announced the Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. JIP/Med Onco/Trial Unit/JTC-2025-2. The detailed notification has been published on the official JIPMER website. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a Degree in Life Sciences are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

qualification.details: Clinical Trial Coordinator: Degree in Life Sciences with 1-year experience in the Medical (Working with patients) Or Medical Research field and Fluency in Tamil.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Overview
JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JIPMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Clinical Trial Coordinator: Degree in Life Sciences with 1-year experience in the Medical (Working with patients) Or Medical Research field and Fluency in Tamil.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Clinical Trial Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the JIPMER recruitment is Clinical Trial Coordinator. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Trial Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Trial Coordinator post at JIPMER.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Trial Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 22,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Clinical Trial Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Life Sciences with 1-year experience in the Medical or Medical Research field and fluency in Tamil.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Clinical Trial Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Trial Coordinator post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Clinical Trial Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.
